A spread (`...`) inside `componentOverrides` could not be inspected - theme variable renames and child-component key changes inside it were not applied. Please review it manually.

Component overrides were moved from `theme.componentOverrides` to `themeOverride.components`. Components imported from v11.6 or earlier still read the legacy `theme.componentOverrides` channel, so any such component inside this provider will no longer receive its override - upgrade those components to v11.7 or `latest`.
